name: presentation-architect-chain
description: Design a complete presentation architecture from topic and audience, including narrative arc, key messages, stakeholder strategies, objection handling, Q&A prep, visual strategy, and follow-up plan.

steps.description: Execute all 8 phases of presentation architecture design in sequence

entry_inputs.presentation_topic: string (required) - The subject matter or core idea of the presentation
entry_inputs.audience_description: string (required) - Who will attend: size, role, expertise level, interests, pain points
entry_inputs.presentation_context: string (optional) - Where, when, how: venue type, event type, time allocation, format constraints. Defaults to 'internal meeting, 60 minutes, in-person, no constraints specified'
entry_inputs.known_constraints: string (optional) - Regulatory, brand, or technical constraints

terminal_outputs.presentation_architecture: Complete structured presentation plan with narrative arc, key messages, stakeholder strategies, anticipated objections, Q&A prep, visual strategy, speaker notes, and post-presentation follow-up
terminal_outputs.validation_checklist: Confirmation that all components are present and internally consistent
